This is a testharness.js-based test.
FAIL select[multiple][style="writing-mode: horizontal-tb"] supports keyboard navigation assert_true: expected true got false
FAIL select[multiple][style="writing-mode: vertical-lr"] supports keyboard navigation assert_true: expected true got false
FAIL select[multiple][style="writing-mode: vertical-rl"] supports keyboard navigation assert_true: expected true got false
Harness: the test ran to completion.
